title: [spec-compliance] OSCORE test expects 2U but named fallback_to_zero
description: test_nvm_read_failure_fallback_to_zero (or similar in oscore test) was changed to assert ssn==2U after NVM failure. Spec/RFC 8613 and oscore.h:182 require SSN start at 0 with explicit set_sender_seq before protect. Mismatch in test name vs behavior and fallback logic in oscore_ctx_set_sender_seq may violate monotonicity MUST in RFC 8613 §7.2.1. Check against test/vectors/ and spec security sections.
